findings.description: Section s2 (利用の準備) combines two distinct h3 subsections (入力元となる設計書に関する設定 and ファイル生成に関する設定) into a single knowledge section. The combined plain-text content significantly exceeds 2000 characters (two configuration tables, two XML code examples). While markdown ## subheadings are used internally to preserve structure, splitting into separate sections would improve granularity and retrieval precision.
findings.source_evidence: Source has two --- level subsections under 利用の準備: '入力元となる設計書に関する設定' (ConfigurationLoader table + XML example) and 'ファイル生成に関する設定' (ConfigGenSettings table + XML example).
